channel.title: Moon on The Lexicon
channel.description: Recent content in Moon on The Lexicon

item.title: Difficulties when making a lexer.
item.description: Problem 1: Not understanding what a lexer is.

item.title: Why I want to make a programming language
item.description: Lore drop I’ve tried making rlox, the lox programming language featured in CraftingInterpreters but implemented in Rust instead of Java, ~3 years ago.
